title: Friedwyvern's Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon-focused pack with other tech and farming mods to expand the experience!
body:
A medium sized modpack that includes:

- Cobblemon and Create along with some addons for them
- Reworks to structures like the mineshaft and stronghold
- Some decoration and cosmetic mods
- Quality of life changes and other bug fixes
and more!

This Modpack is Fabric Modpack with Version 1.20.1
